votes.rationale: Binds all slots to an OpenAI-only baseline so role panels can be used consistently. Slot indirection keeps future provider/model swaps cheap and auditable.
Low risk: no secrets stored, only provider/model labels. Keeps system operational while deferring multi-provider complexity and budgeting to a later motion.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. This is the correct baseline step after role panel registration and bulk instantiation.
